title: Joynola (Buona Vista/Holland V/Kent Ridge/Botanic Gardens)
description:
Cookies & Biscuits, Granola
Joynola is a play on the word ‘granola’, whereby we hope to spread joy and encourage a healthy eating lifestyle through healthy snacking.
Joynola also believes it is okay to have emotions – not just joy (JOY? NO LAH!), but anger, sadness, pain, fear as well. Emotions are all part of our human experience. Ah, we just want to embrace you in a huge hug, and assure you that it is alright to feel things. Although, do know that while emotions are ~okay~, it may not be helpful if fear turns to clinical anxiety, anger turns into bitterness, and sadness turns into rumination and vengeance. If so, we do encourage you to seek professional help. Do drop us an message if you know someone who is struggling emotionally, we would love to send some Joynola their way at no costs!
While the joy we provide is temporal and will end once you reach the bottom of the bag, we believe that there is such a thing as true joy – one that is everlasting, eternal, and never-ending.
You can contact me on Telegram @hagumogu or Instagram @joynolabakes. Do check out the website for our delivery options! While in the CB period, we will focus on delivering through NinjaVan whenever possible. Otherwise, meet-ups will be free of charge at selected MRTs :-)
